review_context: Chris Barber 50 agent UI concept explorations → Sylveste architectural fit
verdict_rationale: Comprehensive cross-layer alignment on immediate priorities (Masaq quick-wins), clear architectural mapping (Skaffen evidence extensions + phase-FSM), and strategic moat (Autarch speculative fleet). No blocking disagreements; all agents converge on implementation sequence.

highest_priority.name: Lens switching (convo/edits/files/cost/timeline/learnings/decisions)
highest_priority.reasoning: Immediate productivity win; same data, multiple interpretive frames; no runtime changes required

highest_priority.name: Terminal frame health-state coloring
highest_priority.reasoning: Trivial to implement; high observability; pure lipgloss styling

highest_priority.name: Waveform tok/s usage display
highest_priority.reasoning: Requires new sparkline component; feeds into broader real-time awareness suite

highest_priority.name: Smart progress bars with ETA forecasting
highest_priority.reasoning: Closes OODARC loop on phase estimates; data already exists in interstat

highest_priority.name: Notification queue
highest_priority.reasoning: Unblocks agents faster; reduces manual polling; fundamental for multi-agent orchestration

strategic_moat.name: Parallel exploration mode (N branches)
strategic_moat.rationale: Terminal-first differentiator vs GUI competitors; executable via Skaffen's OODARC + ParallelRunner

strategic_moat.name: Multi-path exploration with branch selection
strategic_moat.rationale: Extends #17 with branch scoring; foundation for A/B testing and alternatives comparison

strategic_moat.name: Speculative pre-build queue
strategic_moat.rationale: Pre-warms context for likely next tasks; radical latency reduction; requires Skaffen + Coldwine + Pollard coordination

preference_learning.name: Auto-pick high-confidence preferences
preference_learning.rationale: Foundation for proactive layer; trust.Learn() already exists; needs confidence counter + auto-promote threshold

preference_learning.name: Proactive preference calibration
preference_learning.rationale: Systematizes PRD intake; Gurgeh detects ambiguity and asks before generating; closes feedback loop

key_tensions.position_1: fd-theme-clustering: gamification ideas (#32-35) form a 6-idea cluster; strong creative preoccupation
key_tensions.position_2: fd-autarch-product-surface: hard-exclude #32/#35 (pure theater); reframe #33/#34/#41 as evidence-producing features
key_tensions.resolution: All agents agree: exclude #32 (failed-deploy-pwned), #35 (random critical hits); include #33 (rationale mode), #34 (sprint receipt), #41 (wrapped summary), #49 (opt-in leaderboard). Theater is secondary; evidence is primary.
key_tensions.recommendation: Proceed with evidence-first framing. Victory celebrations are receipts (cost, duration, model performance), not cosmetics.

key_tensions.position_1: fd-skaffen-runtime-primitives: ParallelRunner requires new agent/parallel/ package; phase-FSM must fork
key_tensions.position_2: fd-masaq-component-patterns: focus on splitpane for multi-pane display; TUI layout is orthogonal to runtime
key_tensions.position_3: fd-terminal-feasibility: column width at 80 cols limits splitpane readability; graceful fallback to toggle view
key_tensions.resolution: All three are compatible. Skaffen owns runtime (branch spawning); Masaq owns display (splitpane layout); terminal constraints are respected (80-col fallback).
key_tensions.recommendation: Proceed in parallel: Skaffen ParallelRunner in next sprint; Masaq splitpane + tabbar in same sprint.

key_tensions.position_1: fd-skaffen-runtime-primitives: C3 learned preferences in Skaffen's session context
key_tensions.position_2: fd-autarch-product-surface: C3 learned preferences in ~/.config/autarch/preferences.db (per PHILOSOPHY.md)
key_tensions.position_3: fd-masaq-component-patterns: UI surface for preference dialogs; persistent backend is orthogonal
key_tensions.resolution: No conflict. Autarch owns preferences.db per PHILOSOPHY.md C3 tier (per-project, not kernel). Skaffen reads/writes session-level confidence signals. Masaq renders calibration dialogs.
key_tensions.recommendation: Proceed. Autarch allocates preferences.db; Skaffen feeds confidence metrics into it.

phase_1_masaq_quick_wins.description: Zero-dependency Masaq rendering components for Clusters A+C+F (Temporal Awareness + View Switching + Affect subset)
phase_1_masaq_quick_wins.blocking_criteria: None; these consume existing Skaffen evidence stream

phase_2_skaffen_evidence_extensions.description: New Skaffen evidence types and session management for proactive layer foundation

deliverables.feature: Decision record parsing from model output

phase_2_skaffen_evidence_extensions.blocking_criteria: None; these extend existing APIs without breaking changes

phase_3_skaffen_parallel_runtime.description: Phase-FSM fork, ParallelRunner, BranchRunner for Cluster D (Speculative & Exploratory)

deliverables.note: Foundation for all branching modes; requires session.Snapshot() + session.Merge()

phase_3_skaffen_parallel_runtime.blocking_criteria: Blocks all speculative/exploration features; highest architectural impact

phase_4_masaq_multi_pane.description: splitpane component for side-by-side visualization; conditional on Phase 3 runtime work

deliverables.note: lipgloss.JoinHorizontal wrapper; fixed-ratio split; graceful 80-col fallback to toggle

phase_4_masaq_multi_pane.blocking_criteria: Depends on ParallelRunner producing branch-tagged evidence

phase_5_autarch_tools.description: Slice the 4 Autarch tools (Bigend, Coldwine, Gurgeh, Pollard) by feature priority and cross-tool signaling

deliverables.note: All read existing evidence; no new Coldwine/Gurgeh/Pollard changes needed
#17 requires Skaffen ParallelRunner to be stable
Requires CASS integration for session context; foundation for proactive layer

tier_1_highest_leverage.justification: Covers 5 ideas (1, 9, 11, 21, 41); token rate visualization is foundational observability
Covers 3 ideas (15, 30, 42); lens switching is top priority; broadly reusable

tier_2_next.justification: Covers 3 ideas (17, 42, 47); conditional on Skaffen ParallelRunner

tier_3_conditional.justification: Covers 2 ideas (6, 36-equivalent); needed for codebase awareness
Covers 3 ideas (24, 34, 35); essential for event feedback

out_of_scope_and_rationale.name: Desktop peripheral controller
out_of_scope_and_rationale.reason: Hardware HID integration outside terminal scope

out_of_scope_and_rationale.name: Mobile tap UI
out_of_scope_and_rationale.reason: Touch events not representable in terminal escape sequences; requires native mobile app

out_of_scope_and_rationale.name: Energy-aware decision routing
out_of_scope_and_rationale.reason: Hardware sensor access; routing logic not UI concern

out_of_scope_and_rationale.name: Coding agent as video game (failed deploy = pwned)
out_of_scope_and_rationale.reason: Pure theater; produces no evidence; conflicts with PHILOSOPHY.md receipts-first

out_of_scope_and_rationale.name: Slash command familiarity (cosmetic)
out_of_scope_and_rationale.reason: Low signal; explicit /help already exists; not worth UX complexity

out_of_scope_and_rationale.name: Auto-generated shortcuts
out_of_scope_and_rationale.reason: Conflicts with explicit keybinding philosophy; breaks muscle memory

out_of_scope_and_rationale.name: Auto shortcuts + gamified learning
out_of_scope_and_rationale.reason: Auto-gen part is out of scope; discovery is a separate feature (conditional include)

out_of_scope_and_rationale.name: Cross-company leaderboard
out_of_scope_and_rationale.reason: Requires established cross-org privacy model; deferred

masaq_branch: Build sparkline component (ring buffer + Unicode blocks)
Build tabbar component (lens switching tab row)
Add Active color to SemanticColors (both themes)
Pull into Skaffen via local replace, test with existing evidence stream
skaffen_branch: Implement FileActivity evidence extraction in ToolCallDetail hook
Add Discovery event type + /treasures slash command
Implement PostSessionHook for Suggestion generation (integrate CASS context)
autarch_bigend: Implement Lens tab bar (Convo | Edits | Files | Cost | Timeline | Decisions)
Add ETA forecast column to agent list (sources from interstat calibrate-phase-costs)
Add Breadcrumb trail per-agent (phase + file + tool)
cross_tool_coordination: Define 5 new Intermute event types (SpecScopeUpdated, ToolUsed, EnergyLevelUpdated, SpeculativeTasksReady, ContextPreWarmed)
Wire Intermute subscribers in each tool (Gurgeh → Coldwine drift scorer, Pollard → Bigend suggestions, Coldwine → Bigend status)

mitigations: Design ParallelRunner as a clean abstraction; respect agentloop import constraints
Add comprehensive evidence isolation per-branch (BranchID field)
Phase-FSM fork requires careful handling of shared state (budget, context) — prefer snapshot-per-branch
Test branching extensively before shipping; speculative runs are a new execution model
Each new component is isolated; existing viewport/compact/diff unchanged
tea.Tick sufficiency verified for all animation requirements
Intermute already proven for REST + WebSocket; new event types are conservative extensions
Prefer push events over pull; tools subscribe to only events they need
Circuit breaker on event processing; dropped events should not block tool startup

success_criteria: Masaq quick-wins ship within 2 sprints (12 components, zero Skaffen dependencies)
Bigend shows Lens tabs, ETA forecasts, Task queue within 2 sprints
ParallelRunner design doc completed and reviewed before Phase 3 starts
All 50 ideas either assigned, deferred, or explicitly rejected with rationale
No agent UI idea blocks Skaffen or Autarch core functionality
